## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Verification

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo check` if backend changed
- [ ] `npm run tauri:build` if packaging changed

## Notes

- user-visible changes
- compatibility or migration concerns
- screenshots or recordings if UI changed

## AI Assistance

- [ ] No substantial AI assistance
- [ ] Substantial AI assistance was used and reviewed manually
